summary: Bank Recon JE matching feature fully tested. All 14 pytest tests pass (12 passed, 2 skipped as expected). Full regression suite 174 passed, 3 skipped. Frontend candidate picker shows JE badges correctly (51 JE candidates in picker for BCA session). Auto-match correctly matched JAE-2606-00235 at 99% confidence.
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created by pytest (BCA account, je_test.csv, je_fields.csv, gl_id_test.csv)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bank Recon JE matching feature fully working. _build_candidates extended with JE source (lines.coa_id=gl_account_id). Session stores gl_account_id from bank_accounts. auto_match and get_match_candidates pass gl_account_id. bulk_auto_accept also passes gl_account_id (via session_extras.py). Frontend: candidate picker shows JE badge for journal_entry type and PAY badge for payment_request type. Tested: BCA bank account has gl_account_id=628d9b19, 300+ posted JEs matching. JE candidates have JAE- prefix doc_no, non-zero amounts, entry_date.
